title: KAWD-530 Completely subjective! A trip to a hot spring with just two people Sakura Yura
overview: The first overnight trip with Yura-chan. I love the way she frolics happily with her eyes shining, and the excitement doesn't subside all day long! Jupofera while caring about the surroundings in the car, smashing sex while killing the voice in the open-air bath, flirting caress battle while washing the body, passionate sex that hits each other, waking up and refreshing SEX! "I'm just doing naughty things!" A trip to the Pakopako hot springs where you can feel like a lover with complete subjectivity!
